movie.actors: Christian Bale, Matthew McConaughey, Izabella Scorupco, Gerard Butler
movie.plot: A brood of fire-breathing dragons emerges from the earth and begins setting everything ablaze, establishing dominance over the planet.
movie.title: Reign of Fire
movie.writer: Gregg Chabot (story), Kevin Peterka (story), Gregg Chabot (screenplay), Kevin Peterka (screenplay), Matt Greenberg (screenplay)
